degraded_reason: Parent implemented the selected documentation/examples bead directly and used two independent reviewer subagents.
implementation_summary: Expanded package documentation to describe observer scope, no-network defaults, transport-agnostic helper types, and Datadog exporter configuration boundary.
Added compile-checked package examples for minimal session/run usage and a fuller model-call, streaming, tool, retry, and compaction workflow.
Kept examples limited to exported einoobs types and standard library values, with no concrete Eino runtime, provider SDK, AG-UI runtime, Datadog transport, or OpenTelemetry dependencies.
